description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Mac that runs on push and pull request events. Use a macos-latest job with 4 parallel jobs, checking out the repository, then install dependencies, and perform different build and deployment steps based on whether the workflow is triggered by a tag or not. For tags, perform a release build, deploy, and upload assets to a GitHub release. For non-tags, perform a daily build, deploy, and upload assets to a GitHub prerelease.
